title: MatchResponse
description: The response to a match query (iwant.fyi demand-side protocol v1.1 §6.1).

degraded.description: v1.1 — true iff one+ attempted sources did not contribute.

incomplete_source_count.description: v1.1 — count of failed sources (no names).

next_cursor.description: v1.1 — opaque pagination cursor; null when no more pages.
